name: io.github.nodemint-dev/projectmind
title: projectmind
description: Persistent, compact project memory for coding agents: a git-committed project map read as one ~400-token digest instead of re-scanning the codebase — with a local ledger of tokens/dollars saved, session handoff, and a CI-enforced offline guarantee.

packageArguments.description: Run the stdio MCP server subcommand.
